error_signature: second loop does not process the sub-scenes
title: Second loop not processing sub-scenes correctly
symptom: The second loop passes the sub-scenes of the next scene directly to the done node without processing them.
applies_when: Using nested loops for scenes and sub-scenes
root_cause: The second loop is not properly connected to the output of the first loop, causing it to skip processing the sub-scenes of subsequent scenes. This can occur if the data flow between nodes is not correctly established.
fix_steps: Ensure that the connection from 'Loop Over Items1' to 'Loop Over Items2' is correctly set up to pass the output of the first loop.
Verify that 'Loop Over Items2' is configured to receive the correct data from 'Loop Over Items1'.
agent_instruction: Check and fix the connections between the loops to ensure proper data flow.
